enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Un Kanavugal'?

The song 'Un Kanavugal' expresses the beauty of love and dreams, highlighting how one's dreams are intertwined with their beloved.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Kadhal Kan Kattudhe'?

The movie revolves around themes of love and relationships, showcasing the journey of the protagonists as they navigate their feelings.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Bobo Shashi, who is known for his melodious tunes in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Un Kanavugal' released?

'Un Kanavugal' was released on December 1, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Un Kanavugal' from Kadhal Kan Kattudhe, the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and longing. The melody, paired with Bobo Shashi's soothing voice, creates an atmosphere of romance that resonates with listeners. The song reflects the journey of love, emphasizing the dreams and aspirations shared between partners. It evokes feelings of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Kanavugal from the movie Kadhal Kan Kattudhe is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and dreams. With Bobo Shashi's enchanting vocals and heartfelt lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has ever been in love. Experience the magic of this unique composition that blends emotion and melody seamlessly.
stanzaMeanings: Your memories are your world. Your dreams are what your heart holds.
If you walk while searching for yourself, everything will come together in your hands.
If you stay on your path, it will lead to success...
Your memories are your world. Your dreams are what your heart holds.
When it comes to men, there are some questions. When it comes to women, there are many questions.
Success will bring great rewards. Failures will turn into a song.
Until you reach the end, keep moving forward without stopping. You must always seek without resting with you.
The eyes of the nation say that women are the treasures of the home, and they should be treated as such.
Your memories are your world. Your dreams are what your heart holds.
